metric_results.label: Retrieval fallback rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

metric_results.label: Material OCR failure rate
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect runtime traces, retry policy, fallback rates, artifact upload, and render telemetry.

metric_results.label: Final numeric OCR error count
metric_results.remediation_hint: Fix OCR errors that affect final reported numbers before export.

threshold_policy.rationale: Block final export until OCR-caused numeric errors are resolved.

metric_results.label: Artifact upload failures
metric_results.remediation_hint: Retry or repair final artifact storage uploads before export.

metric_results.label: PDF render failures
metric_results.remediation_hint: Fix final PDF rendering failures before export.

metric_results.label: Full report p95 latency, warm run
metric_results.metric_name: Full report p95 latency, warm run
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect warm full-report p95 latency regressions.

metric_results.label: Full report p95 latency, cold run
metric_results.metric_name: Full report p95 latency, cold run
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect cold full-report p95 latency and ingest/OCR bottlenecks.

metric_results.label: Render-only p95 latency
metric_results.remediation_hint: Optimize render-only PDF generation and inspect final render telemetry.

metric_results.label: Flash memo p95 latency, warm run
metric_results.metric_name: Flash memo p95 latency, warm run
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect warm flash memo latency regressions.

metric_results.label: Flash memo p95 latency, cold retrieval
metric_results.metric_name: Flash memo p95 latency, cold retrieval
metric_results.remediation_hint: Inspect retrieval/crawl bottlenecks for flash memo generation.

metric_results.label: Latency regression
metric_results.remediation_hint: Compare new p95 latency against the locked baseline and investigate regressions.

threshold_policy.rationale: Compare p95 to previous baseline and bisect regression.

metric_results.label: Cost per full report
metric_results.remediation_hint: Apply budget policy, cache reuse, and model routing when report cost exceeds the soft budget.
